decks.notes: The deck focuses on controlling the opponent's actions by using counterspells, removal spells, and powerful planeswalkers like Teferi and Narset. It also includes cards that can generate card advantage like Consult the Star Charts and Day's Undoing. The deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan and eventually win through card advantage and powerful threats like Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury. The mana base is carefully crafted to support the deck's control strategy while also providing the necessary colors for casting spells efficiently.

The deck focuses on quickly deploying low-cost artifacts to generate value and disrupt the opponent's strategy. It uses cards like Arcbound Ravager and Emry, Lurker of the Loch to recur artifacts and put pressure on the opponent. Engineered Explosives and Metallic Rebuke provide control elements, while Urza's Saga helps tutor for key artifacts. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of aggression and disruption, using the synergies between artifacts to gain an advantage in the game.

This deck focuses on utilizing aggressive creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Territorial Kavu to quickly apply pressure on the opponent. The inclusion of powerful cards like Scion of Draco and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury adds resilience and threats to the board. Additionally, support cards like Lightning Bolt and Stubborn Denial help control the board and protect your creatures. Leyline of the Guildpact and Leyline Binding provide extra value by boosting your creatures and disrupting the opponent's strategy. Overall, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with fast, efficient creatures and powerful synergies.

The key strategy of this deck is to establish control over the game using powerful Eldrazi creatures and disruption spells. By assembling the UrzaTron lands, the deck can quickly ramp up its mana and cast massive threats like Ulamog, the Ceaseless Hunger. Thought-Knot Seer and Sowing Mycospawn help disrupt the opponent's game plan, while cards like Karn, the Great Creator and All Is Dust provide additional control elements. The deck also utilizes artifacts like Relic of Progenitus and Mystic Forge to maintain card advantage and outvalue the opponent.

The deck focuses on aggressive plays with a mix of creatures and burn spells to quickly close out the game. It relies on creating a wide board presence with creatures like Ragavan, Guide of Souls, and Phlage, while also utilizing burn spells like Galvanic Discharge and Goblin Bombardment to finish off opponents. The inclusion of Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Voice of Victory adds additional pressure and potential for repeatable damage. The deck also includes disruption with Ranger-Captain of Eos and Surgical Extraction, as well as some utility with Thraben Charm and Blood Moon. Additionally, the mana base is optimized for consistency and speed.

The deck focuses on using instant reanimation spells like Goryo's Vengeance and Ephemerate to bring powerful creatures like Griselbrand and Atraxa, Grand Unifier onto the battlefield quickly. Support cards like Solitude and Psychic Frog help control the board and disrupt opponents, while Quantum Riddler provides card advantage. Faithful Mending and Prismatic Ending offer additional utility and removal. Thoughtseize and Force of Negation help protect the combo pieces, and Teferi, Time Raveler provides additional disruption. The mana base is flexible and includes various shock lands and fetch lands for consistency.

The deck focuses on utilizing artifact creatures and a variety of artifacts to quickly overwhelm the opponent with damage through efficient, low-cost spells. By combining aggressive creatures like Kappa Cannoneer and Pinnacle Emissary with powerful artifacts like Mishra's Bauble and Engineered Explosives, the deck aims to create a fast, aggressive board presence. The inclusion of cards like Tormod's Crypt and Urza's Saga provide additional utility and card advantage, while cards like Galvanic Blast and Thoughtcast help maintain pressure and card advantage in the early game. The deck seeks to quickly build a threatening board state and close out the game before the opponent can stabilize.

The deck focuses on assembling a variety of creatures with unique abilities to create powerful combos and synergies. It uses cards like Yawgmoth, Thran Physician, Walking Ballista, and Agatha's Soul Cauldron to manipulate counters and sacrifice creatures for value. The toolbox aspect allows for flexibility in finding the right creature for the situation through cards like Green Sun's Zenith and Chord of Calling. The deck also incorporates cards like Malevolent Rumble and Dredger's Insight for removal and card advantage. The key strategy is to outvalue and outmaneuver the opponent with a versatile and unpredictable creature arsenal.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly deploy threats and disrupt the opponent's game plan using artifacts. By utilizing cards that synergize well with artifacts such as Arcbound Ravager and Mox Opal, this deck aims to apply pressure while controlling the board with cards like Engineered Explosives and Tormod's Crypt. In addition, the deck includes support cards like Pithing Needle and Metallic Rebuke to further disrupt the opponent. Overall, this deck leverages the affinity mechanic to create a fast-paced, aggressive strategy while also maintaining a level of control over the game.

The main strategy of this deck is to quickly ramp up mana and search for key combo pieces like Primeval Titan and Amulet of Vigor to create explosive turns. By utilizing cards like Scapeshift and Urza's Saga, the deck aims to generate massive amounts of value and overwhelm the opponent with powerful lands and creatures. With the ability to tutor for specific cards and protect important spells with Boseiju, Who Endures, this deck can consistently assemble its combo pieces and win the game in a devastating fashion.

The key concept of this Boros Aggro deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of aggressive creatures and efficient removal spells. The deck aims to apply early pressure with creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Seasoned Pyromancer, supported by spells like Galvanic Discharge and Goblin Bombardment to remove blockers and finish off the opponent. The inclusion of Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Voice of Victory provides additional threats and disruption, while the mana base allows for consistent casting of spells and creatures. The deck is designed to win quickly through efficient beatdown strategies.

The main focus of this Boros Aggro deck is to quickly deploy aggressive creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Seasoned Pyromancer to apply pressure to the opponent. The deck also includes cards like Ranger-Captain of Eos and Guide of Souls to maintain card advantage and synergize with token generation from Ocelot Pride. Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Voice of Victory provide buff and combat trick capabilities, while cards like Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury and Goblin Bombardment offer additional reach and removal options. Overall, the deck aims to swarm the board and overwhelm the opponent with efficient threats.

The core idea of this deck is to play aggressively with small creatures while disrupting the opponent's game plan with taxing effects. By combining aggressive creatures like Ragavan and Phelia with disruptive cards like Solitude and Consign to Memory, the deck aims to pressure the opponent's life total while hindering their ability to develop their board. The inclusion of Fable of the Mirror-Breaker and Quantum Riddler allows for additional card advantage and disruption, creating a versatile and resilient strategy focused on overwhelming the opponent.

This Aggro - Affinity deck focuses on quickly developing a board presence with low-cost artifacts and utilizing synergies between cards like Arcbound Ravager and Claws of Gix to control the battlefield. The deck also includes cards like Tormod's Crypt and Engineered Explosives to disrupt opponent strategies. With strong artifact-based mana ramp and card draw from Mishra's Bauble and Thoughtcast, this deck aims to overwhelm opponents with efficient threats and efficient removal. Urza's Saga provides additional value by tutoring for key artifacts to enhance the deck's aggressive strategy.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly and aggressively deal damage to the opponent using low-cost and efficient creatures like Monastery Swiftspear and Dragon's Rage Channeler, while also utilizing spells like Lightning Bolt and Mutagenic Growth to control the board and protect your creatures. The deck aims to apply pressure early in the game and maintain a high tempo throughout, finishing off the opponent before they have a chance to stabilize. Card selection and efficient mana usage are key to maximizing the deck's aggressive potential.

The main concept of this UB Mill deck is to quickly and efficiently mill the opponent's library using cards like Hedron Crab, Ruin Crab, Archive Trap, and Fractured Sanity. By leveraging the graveyard as a resource with cards like Surgical Extraction and Visions of Beyond, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while building advantage for itself. The inclusion of Obosh, the Preypiercer as a companion adds an additional source of damage to pressure the opponent. Overall, the deck aims to mill the opponent out before they can execute their own win condition.
